{{Navbox | name = Religious Confucianism | title = [[Religious Confucianism]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist
|group1 = Rituals |list1 = * [[Jesa]] * [[Sacrifice to Heaven]] ** [[Festival Huế]] * [[Feng Shan]] * [[Ritual and music system]] * [[Guan Li]] * [[Ji Li (ceremony)|Ji Li]] * [[Traditional Chinese marriage|Marriage]] * [[Chinese ghost marriage|Ghost marriage]] * [[Worship of the living]]
|group2 = Concepts |list2 = * [[Shendao shejiao]] * [[Chinese theology]] * [[Mandate of Heaven]] * [[Confucian ritual religion]] * [[Filial piety]] * [[Unity of Heaven and humanity]] * [[Interactions Between Heaven and Mankind]] * [[Chinese folk religion]] * [[Ancestor veneration in China]] * [[Son of Heaven]] * [[Tianxia]] * [[Yan Huang Zisun]] * [[Soil and grain]]
|group3 = Organizations |list3 = * [[Confucian church]] * [[Holy Confucian Church]] * [[Xuanyuan teaching]] * [[Taigu school]] * [[Shengdao]] * [[Confucian Academy]] * [[Confucian Shinto]] ** [[Shintō Taiseikyō|Taiseikyo]] ** [[Shinto Shusei|Shusei]] ** [[Yamazaki Ansai|Suika Shinto]] ** [[Onmyōdō]]
|group4 = People |list4 = * [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Confucius]] * [[Xunzi (philosopher)|Xunzi]] * [[Kang Youwei]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]]
|group5 = Buildings |list5 = * [[Temple of Confucius]] * [[Confucian royal ancestral shrine]] * [[Ancestral shrine]] * [[Religious goods store]] * [[Hero shrine]] * [[Myo shrine]] ** [[Jongmyo (Seoul)|Jongmyo]] ** [[Munmyo]] * [[Ci shrine]] * [[Miao shrine]] * [[Yin miao]] * Beijing Temples ** [[Temple of Heaven]] ** [[Beijing Shejitan]] ** [[Temple of Agriculture]]
|group6 = Objects |list6 = * [[Spirit tablet]] * [[Tiangong censer]] * [[Hell money]] * [[Confucian coin charm]] * [[Joss paper]]
|group7 = Books |list7 = * [[Four Books and Five Classics]] * [[Thirteen Classics]]
|group8 = Deities |list8 = * [[Tian]] * [[Shangdi]] * [[Wufang Shangdi]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] ** [[Baidi (god)|White Emperor]] *** [[Shaohao]] ** [[Heidi (god)|Black Emperor]] *** [[Zhuanxu]] *** [[Xuanwu (god)|Xuanwu]] ** [[Cangdi|Bluegreen Emperor]] *** [[Fu Xi]] ** [[Chidi (god)|Red Emperor]] *** [[Shennong]] *** [[Flame Emperor]] *** [[Zhurong]]
|group9 = Tutelary deities |list9 = * [[Landlord deity#In China|Landlord deity]] * [[Tudigong]] * [[City God (China)|City God]] * [[Mountain God]]
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Religious Confucianism]] </noinclude>

|group1 = Rituals |list1 = * [[:en:Jesa|Jesa]] * [[:en:Sacrifice to Heaven|Sacrifice to Heaven]] ** [[:en:Festival Huế|Festival Huế]] * [[:en:Feng Shan|Feng Shan]] * [[Ritual and music system]] * [[:en:Guan Li|Guan Li]] * [[:en:Ji Li (ceremony)|Ji Li]] * [[Traditional Chinese marriage|Marriage]] * [[:en:Chinese ghost marriage|Ghost marriage]] * [[Worship of the living]]
|group2 = Concepts |list2 = * [[Shendao shejiao]] * [[:en:Chinese theology|Chinese theology]] * [[:en:Mandate of Heaven|Mandate of Heaven]] * [[:en:Confucian ritual religion|Confucian ritual religion]] * [[:en:Filial piety|Filial piety]] * [[Unity of Heaven and humanity]] * [[:en:Interactions Between Heaven and Mankind|Interactions Between Heaven and Mankind]] * [[:en:Chinese folk religion|Chinese folk religion]] * [[:en:Ancestor veneration in China|Ancestor veneration in China]] * [[Son of Heaven]] * [[Tianxia]] * [[Yan Huang Zisun]] * [[Soil and grain]]
|group3 = Organizations |list3 = * [[:en:Confucian church|Confucian church]] * [[:en:Holy Confucian Church|Holy Confucian Church]] * [[Xuanyuan teaching]] * [[:en:Taigu school|Taigu school]] * [[Shengdao]] * [[:en:Confucian Academy|Confucian Academy]] * [[Confucian Shinto]] ** [[Shintō Taiseikyō|Taiseikyo]] ** [[Shinto Shusei|Shusei]] ** [[Yamazaki Ansai|Suika Shinto]] ** [[Onmyōdō]]
|group4 = People |list4 = * [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[:en:Confucius|Confucius]] * [[Xunzi (philosopher)|Xunzi]] * [[:en:Kang Youwei|Kang Youwei]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]]
|group5 = Buildings |list5 = * [[Temple of Confucius]] * [[:en:Confucian royal ancestral shrine|Confucian royal ancestral shrine]] * [[Ancestral shrine]] * [[Religious goods store]] * [[:en:Martyrs' shrines (China)|Martyrs' shrines (China)]] * [[:en:Myo shrine|Myo shrine]] ** [[:en:Jongmyo (Seoul)|Jongmyo]] ** [[:en:Munmyo|Munmyo]] * [[:en:Ci Shrine|Ci Shrine]] * [[:en:Miao shrine|Miao shrine]] * [[Yin miao]] * Beijing Temples ** [[Temple of Heaven]] ** [[:en:Beijing Shejitan|Beijing Shejitan]] ** [[Temple of Agriculture]]
|group6 = Objects |list6 = * [[Spirit tablet]] * [[Tiangong censer]] * [[:en:Hell money|Hell money]] * [[:en:Confucian coin charm|Confucian coin charm]] * [[:en:Joss paper|Joss paper]]
|group7 = Books |list7 = * [[:en:Four Books and Five Classics|Four Books and Five Classics]] * [[Thirteen Classics]]
|group8 = Deities |list8 = * [[Tian]] * [[Shangdi]] * [[Wufang Shangdi]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] ** [[:en:Baidi (god)|White Emperor]] *** [[Shaohao]] ** [[:en:Heidi (god)|Black Emperor]] *** [[Zhuanxu]] *** [[Xuanwu (god)|Xuanwu]] ** [[:en:Cangdi|Bluegreen Emperor]] *** [[:en:Fu Xi|Fu Xi]] ** [[:en:Chidi (god)|Red Emperor]] *** [[Shennong]] *** [[:en:Flame Emperor|Flame Emperor]] *** [[Zhurong]]
|group9 = Tutelary deities |list9 = * [[Landlord deity#In China|Landlord deity]] * [[Tudigong]] * [[:en:City God (China)|City God]] * [[:en:Mountain God|Mountain God]]
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Religious Confucianism]] </noinclude>

|group1 = Rituals |list1 = * [[:en:Jesa|Jesa]] * [[:en:Sacrifice to Heaven|Sacrifice to Heaven]] ** [[:en:Festival Huế|Festival Huế]] * [[:en:Feng Shan|Feng Shan]] * [[Ritual and music system]] * [[:en:Guan Li|Guan Li]] * [[:en:Ji Li (ceremony)|Ji Li]] * [[Traditional Chinese marriage|Marriage]] * [[:en:Chinese ghost marriage|Ghost marriage]] * [[Worship of the living]]

|group5 = Buildings |list5 = * [[Temple of Confucius]] * [[:en:Confucian royal ancestral shrine|Confucian royal ancestral shrine]] * [[Ancestral shrine]] * [[:en:Religious goods store|Religious goods store]] * [[:en:Martyrs' shrines (China)|Martyrs' shrines (China)]] * [[:en:Myo shrine|Myo shrine]] ** [[:en:Jongmyo (Seoul)|Jongmyo]] ** [[:en:Munmyo|Munmyo]] * [[:en:Ci Shrine|Ci Shrine]] * [[:en:Miao shrine|Miao shrine]] * [[Yin miao]] * Beijing Temples ** [[Temple of Heaven]] ** [[:en:Beijing Shejitan|Beijing Shejitan]] ** [[Temple of Agriculture]]

|group2 = Concepts |list2 = * [[:en:Shendao shejiao|Shendao shejiao]] * [[:en:Chinese theology|Chinese theology]] * [[:en:Mandate of Heaven|Mandate of Heaven]] * [[:en:Confucian ritual religion|Confucian ritual religion]] * [[:en:Filial piety|Filial piety]] * [[:en:Unity of Heaven and humanity|Unity of Heaven and humanity]] * [[:en:Interactions Between Heaven and Mankind|Interactions Between Heaven and Mankind]] * [[:en:Chinese folk religion|Chinese folk religion]] * [[:en:Ancestor veneration in China|Ancestor veneration in China]] * [[:en:Son of Heaven|Son of Heaven]] * [[:en:Tianxia|Tianxia]] * [[:en:Yan Huang Zisun|Yan Huang Zisun]] * [[Soil and grain]]

|group5 = Buildings |list5 = * [[:en:Temple of Confucius|Temple of Confucius]] * [[:en:Confucian royal ancestral shrine|Confucian royal ancestral shrine]] * [[Ancestral shrine]] * [[:en:Religious goods store|Religious goods store]] * [[:en:Martyrs' shrines (China)|Martyrs' shrines (China)]] * [[:en:Myo shrine|Myo shrine]] ** [[:en:Jongmyo (Seoul)|Jongmyo]] ** [[:en:Munmyo|Munmyo]] * [[:en:Ci Shrine|Ci Shrine]] * [[:en:Miao shrine|Miao shrine]] * [[:en:Yin miao|Yin miao]] * Beijing Temples ** [[:en:Temple of Heaven|Temple of Heaven]] ** [[:en:Beijing Shejitan|Beijing Shejitan]] ** [[:en:Temple of Agriculture|Temple of Agriculture]]

|group8 = Deities |list8 = * [[:en:Tian|Tian]] * [[:en:Shangdi|Shangdi]] * [[:en:Wufang Shangdi|Wufang Shangdi]] ** [[:en:Yellow Emperor|Yellow Emperor]] ** [[:en:Baidi (god)|White Emperor]] *** [[:en:Shaohao|Shaohao]] ** [[:en:Heidi (god)|Black Emperor]] *** [[:en:Zhuanxu|Zhuanxu]] *** [[:en:Xuanwu (god)|Xuanwu]] ** [[:en:Cangdi|Bluegreen Emperor]] *** [[:en:Fu Xi|Fu Xi]] ** [[:en:Chidi (god)|Red Emperor]] *** [[:en:Shennong|Shennong]] *** [[:en:Flame Emperor|Flame Emperor]] *** [[:en:Zhurong|Zhurong]]
